mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctor (name, avatar, title, department_id, specialty, experience_year, introduction, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{avatar}, #{title}, #{departmentId}, #{specialty}, #{experienceYear}, #{introduction}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.avatar, d.title, d.department_id, d.specialty, d.experience_year, d.introduction, d.status, d.create_time, dept.name AS department_name FROM doctor d LEFT JOIN department dept ON d.department_id = dept.id WHERE d.id = #{id}

SELECT d.id, d.name, d.avatar, d.title, d.department_id, d.specialty, d.experience_year, d.introduction, d.status, d.create_time, dept.name AS department_name FROM doctor d LEFT JOIN department dept ON d.department_id = dept.id ORDER BY d.create_time DESC

SELECT d.id, d.name, d.avatar, d.title, d.department_id, d.specialty, d.experience_year, d.introduction, d.status, d.create_time, dept.name AS department_name FROM doctor d LEFT JOIN department dept ON d.department_id = dept.id WHERE d.department_id = #{departmentId} ORDER BY d.create_time DESC

SELECT d.id, d.name, d.avatar, d.title, d.department_id, d.specialty, d.experience_year, d.introduction, d.status, d.create_time, dept.name AS department_name FROM doctor d LEFT JOIN department dept ON d.department_id = dept.id WHERE d.status = 1 ORDER BY d.create_time DESC
